S0RA Agent
Main Navigation GuideReferenceVOIPGitHub

Appearance

S0RA AgentStandalone Voice Agent CLI

Built around Gemini Live, Vapi, ElevenLabs, and VOIP (Asterisk + Dograh). Mirrors Hermes architecture — works plug-n-play with Hermes or independently.

Quick Start
GitHub Repo
🎙️

Multi-Provider Voice

Switch between Gemini Live, Vapi.ai, ElevenLabs, Edge TTS, OpenAI TTS, Whisper STT with a single CLI command.

📞

VOIP / Asterisk + Dograh

Connect your self-hosted PBX via Asterisk ARI. Route phone calls through Dograh to Gemini Live for AI conversations.

🔌

MCP Integration

Auto-detects running MCP servers (stdio + HTTP). WebSocket MCP with CLI management. Works with Honcho, OpenClaw, Hermes memory.

🎨

Hermes DNA

Same config system, profiles, skins, plugin architecture, constants, logging as Hermes. Drop-in familiar experience.

🌐

Web Dashboard

React + Vite dashboard with live voice demo, provider toggles, MCP status, and real-time system monitoring.

📦

Install Anywhere

pipx install git+https://github.com/Capslockb/sora-agent. Git-based updates. OpenWakeWord "Hey Sora" support.

🩺

Doctor & Benchmark

Built-in health checks, dependency verification, latency benchmarks, and configuration validation.

🤖

ACP Server Mode

Run as ACP server for editor integration (VS Code, Cursor, etc.) with full tool access.

Install Now ​

bash
# Via pipx (recommended)
pipx install git+https://github.com/Capslockb/sora-agent

# Or clone & install
git clone https://github.com/Capslockb/sora-agent
cd sora-agent
pip install -e .

First Commands ​

bash
sora setup           # Interactive wizard (Discord, Voice, MCP, VOIP, Memory, Providers)
sora voice live      # Start Gemini Live bridge (Discord)
sora voice vapi      # Start Vapi bridge (Discord)
sora voice providers # List/enable/disable TTS/STT/LLM providers
sora mcp start       # Start MCP server
sora voip-status     # Check VOIP bridge (Asterisk + Dograh)
sora doctor          # System health check
sora tui --build     # Launch Terminal UI
